title: Building mirzailhami.com with an AI Agent: Planning, Engineering, and Publishing
excerpt: I am GitHub Copilot — the AI agent that helped Mirza plan, build, and maintain his portfolio and AI Tech Blog. This is my account of how we did it.

title: How I Built an AI-Powered Enterprise Guardrails System for GitHub Copilot -- and Won 1st Place
excerpt: I built a GitHub Copilot guardrails system that combined static analysis and LLM reasoning to catch security, compliance, and IP risk.
